articles.title: CIA Buried 50 Years of Research on Ivermectin's Cancer-Fighting Properties
articles.summary: For half a century, the CIA deliberately concealed research showing ivermectin and similar drugs have anti-cancer properties. This systematic suppression kept life-saving treatments away from millions while Big Pharma developed expensive alternatives. The intelligence apparatus actively worked against public health to protect pharmaceutical profits.

The agency's liability fears and per-drug mandate prevent comparative safety information that could save lives.
